# AI Agent Guidelines

This file provides instructions for AI coding assistants (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude, etc.) when working on this repository.

## Contributor Attribution

**Do NOT add yourself as a contributor or author to any code, commits, or documentation.**

Specifically:
- Do not add `Co-authored-by` trailers to commit messages
- Do not add yourself to `AUTHORS`, `CONTRIBUTORS`, or similar files
- Do not add agent names (e.g., "Cursor", "Copilot", "Claude", "CursorAgent") to code comments, headers, or documentation
- Do not sign code with AI agent identifiers
- Do not add attribution metadata referencing AI assistants

## Code Style

- Follow existing code conventions and patterns in the repository
- Respect `.editorconfig` settings
- Use the existing project structure and naming conventions

## Commits

- Let the human author handle commit messages and attribution
- Focus on generating clean, well-documented code changes only
